ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_ref" TEXT /* Reference identifier of the product */,
  "max_joint_width" INTEGER /* Maximum joint width of the seal in mm */,
  "seal_width" INTEGER /* Width of the seal in mm */,
  "seal_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the seal in mm */,
  "integrity" TEXT /* Integrity testing standard associated with the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Type of material used for the seal */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the seal */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range in which the seal is effective */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "date_of_manufacture" TEXT /* Date when the product was manufactured */,
  "third_party_certification" TEXT /* Third-party certifications the product has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the testing standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing standard (e.g., E 120) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing standard */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "required_temperature" TEXT /* Temperature at which the test is conducted */,
  "required_humidity" TEXT /* Humidity level at which the test is conducted */,
  "pass_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for passing the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing result */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tested */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing standard used */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the test */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES testing_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, tester, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product to which this version applies */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the product */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the category */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the mapping */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_mapping_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_mapping_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_mapping_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "activity_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the activity in the format HH:MM:SS */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
